---
title: "roc_auc"
generated: true
description: "Area under the ROC curve (rank / Mann-Whitney form, tie-corrected)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.metrics.classification`](../nitrix-metrics-classification.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:roc_auc -->
```python
roc_auc(scores: Float[Array, 'N'] | Float[Array, 'N C'], labels: Int[Array, 'N'], *, average: Average = 'macro') -> Float[Array, ''] | Float[Array, 'C']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:roc_auc -->
Area under the ROC curve (rank / Mann-Whitney form, tie-corrected).

1-D `scores` is the binary case (positive class = label `1`).  2-D
`scores` `(N, C)` is multiclass one-vs-rest: column `c` scores
"class `c` vs the rest" against `labels == c`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:roc_auc -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `scores` | `Float` | `N` × `C` | — | Decision scores: `(N,)` (binary) or `(N, C)` (per-class, OvR). |
| `labels` | `Int` | `N` | — | Integer labels `(N,)`: `{0, 1}` binary, `{0, ..., C-1}` multiclass. |
| `average` | `Average` | — | `'macro'` | Multiclass pooling of the per-class OvR AUCs (ignored for 1-D scores): `'macro'` (unweighted mean, default), `'micro'` (one AUC over the pooled one-hot scores/labels), or `'none'` (the per-class `(C,)` vector). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `C`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:roc_auc -->
::: {.callout-note}
**Global statistic, not batch-meanable.**  Score on the gathered
`(scores, labels)` accumulated across all batches; a mean of
per-batch AUCs is not the AUC.  Non-differentiable (rank-based).
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:roc_auc -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `C` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
